name: It's Too Hot to Eat Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 15 oz cans black beans, drained and well-rinsed
1 15 oz can whole kernel no-salt-added corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomato, pepper, and onion fairly finely.
2. Coarsely chop the mango.
3. Mix everything together with a couple of grinds of black pepper and a few shakes of salt (if desired).
4. Let chill for an hour.
This recipe improves even more once it sits overnight. It could also be used to make salsa by adding extra tomato and liquid of your choice.
